remarks: Welcome to Mallard's Landing, where exciting improvements are underway, including brand-new siding and new decks that will give the complex a fresh, updated look. This bright and spacious second-floor condominium has an peaceful view of landscaped grounds and trees from the deck. It offers convenient one-level living with two generously sized bedrooms and two full bathrooms. The primary bedroom features a walk-in closet and a private ensuite bath complete with both a tub and shower. The open-concept floor plan connects the living room, dining area, and eat-in kitchen. Sliding glass doors lead from the living area to a private deck, creating the perfect space for fresh air and to relax outdoors. Recent updates include fresh paint and recent carpeting throughout much of the home. The convenience of in-unit laundry adds to its appeal. Additional highlights include a dedicated storage unit, a carport plus an assigned parking space and access to the community's well-maintained in-ground pool. Ideally situated on the Norwalk/Darien border, this desirable location set back from the road offers exceptional convenience with easy access to Route 1, I-95, SoNo, the train station, and walking distance to a wide variety of shopping, dining, and everyday amenities.
